title: Quest Nutri-Q 34729 Turbo Food Chopper/Mini Food Processor / 2 Speeds + Turbo Boost / 0.5L Bowl/Chops All Kinds of Fruit & Vegetables/BPA Free Dishwasher Safe Parts
features: COMPACT FOOD CHOPPER AND MINI FOOD PROCESSOR – This Turbo Food Chopper from Quest’s Nutri-Q range makes chopping fruit and vegetables easy, all while coming in a compact design that makes storage simple! It comes with a 0.5L bowl, allowing you to safely collect plenty of chopped fruits.

SHARP CUTTING BLADES – The stainless steel blades of the chopper are sharp and durable, allowing you to cut all kinds of fruit & veg, such as carrots, onions, tomatoes, celery and more! Make delicious side dishes, sauces, and purees knowing that you can rely on this chopper to cut up everything you need.

DIFFERENT SPEED SETTINGS – The chopper features two different speed settings to allow you to optimise the chopping for smaller or larger foods. In addition, for the tougher ingredients, the chopper also features a turbo mode that will really slice its way through anything chunkier, ensuring it will be ready to use in your meal afterwards.

SAFE & EASY – The mini food processor and chopper features a locking lid that simply needs to be pressed down, and is activated at the touch of a button afterwards. The appliance also features a non-slip base, making the chopper secure and simple to use.

NUTRI-Q BY QUEST – Nutri-Q is the leading range of specialised healthy kitchen appliances, brought to you by the experts at Quest. From electric steamers and juicers, to low-fat grills and omelette makers, Nutri-Q provides you with healthier cooking alternatives that will make you feel great after every meal. Visit the Quest store page on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: From the manufacturer Nutri-Q by Quest Mini Food Chopper Giving the cutting board and knife a break! Compact size easily stored in cupboard - at 0.5L this is the perfect sized mini food processor for chopping vegetables, salads and making dressings at home. The stainless steel cutting blades will see you whizzing through vegetables in no time at all. Helps to create great dishes such as pesto, salsas, dressings, breadcrumbs and believe it or not whipped cream!! Quest Guide for Healthy Living Nutri-Q by Quest has a range of appliances to support a healthy lifestyle, by helping you create delicious, fresh meals to enjoy as part of a balanced diet. Great for Preparing Vegetables Fast! Whiz through vegetables with turbo mode - with two speed settings and the added turbo boost, this will make quick work of preparing your food. Stable, easy operation - our non-slip base & locking lid make this Super safe and easy to use. Easy clean-up - just pop it in the dishwasher after you are finished. Fully dishwasher safe parts. Using your Mini Chopper! A nice little spicy accompaniment to your food... Add tomatoes, coriander, red onion, chillies and a squeeze of lime to your mini chopped and pulse for the perfect salsa addition to any dish. 2 different speed settings! Quick bursts of the Mini Chopper will cut larger pieces of food in second using the stainless steel blades. Pulsing for longer will reduce the contents down to a minced finish. Guacamole, anyone? Add chunks of avocado into the container, a sprinkle of lime juice, dried onion flakes and garlic salt for an quick and easy guacamole.
